elements.description: vertical extension segment F to F' at grid2 (X = extension beyond main grid)
vertical extension segment F to F' at grid4
beam along row F itself (south edge of the F-F' extension bay) -- previously misread as 'sub-level between F and E'
interior spine beam, matches floor 1's B5 at the same grid position
vertical beam, right room (corridor with direction arrow)
beam labeled with callout note 'B1 ที่ระดับชานพัก' -- indicates the adjacent beam at this position is actually B1 but at the STAIR LANDING level, not the main floor-2 level

elements.grid_ref: 1-2 area between D-C, small rooms each marked S1

elements.description: beam alongside stairwell (ST marker with ลง/down arrow) between 3-4, with callout 'B1/B2ที่ระดับชานพัก'
stairwell floor opening (ST mark), down-direction arrow (ลง) -- floor-2 side of the main interior stair
beam with callout note 'B4X/B1ที่ระดับชานพัก'
S1 slab marker within, and a further short dashed extension south of grid A by ~0.40m with SX markers each side

slab_markers.grid_ref: 2-4 area near F, dashed room outline

warnings: IMPORTANT cross-check vs floor 1 (S-04): floor 2's overhang south of grid A is only 0.40m (small eave/balcony edge, matching the y_beyond_A convention seen elsewhere), NOT the ~2.05m deep structural extension seen on floor 1's beam plan. This confirms floor 1's southern extension (dummy grid 'A'' at pos_m=-2.05, flagged provisionally on S-04/grid master) is a GROUND-FLOOR-ONLY feature (e.g. an open carport/terrace with no room above) -- floor 2 does not extend that far south. The grid master's dummy grid should therefore be scoped/noted as applying to ground-floor plans only, not a full-height column line.

Several beam segments near the stairwell (D2 to C2, and 3-4 near D-C) carry explicit callout notes ('B1 ที่ระดับชานพัก', 'B1/B2ที่ระดับชานพัก', 'B4X/B1ที่ระดับชานพัก') indicating the true beam mark at those positions is different at the STAIR LANDING level vs the main floor-2 level printed on this sheet -- recorded both marks where legible, flagged for structural-detail cross-check against S-11/S-12 (stair sheets) once read.

This floor 2 layout confirms a single main interior stair (ST marker, floor opening + ลง/down arrow) positioned at 3-4/D-C -- expect matching S-11/S-12 stair section sheets to reference this same position.

CASCADE_2026-07-19: dummy grid F'(F+1.00) added to the master, confirmed by THIS sheet + S-04 (both print '1.00' above F and both draw the extension-bay beams; elements corrected accordingly). The ชานพัก (landing-level) beams in the stairwell zone now have named dummy lines in the master -- 3'(8.35, landing west edge) and D'(6.60, lane divider) from A-20/S-11 printed chains. The 0.40m y_beyond_A balcony edge has no beam -> not a dummy grid.
